store_headline: Editorial WordPress Portfolio Theme for Designers and Agencies
store_subheadline: An editorial portfolio for designers, agencies, and creatives who demand visual impact
features: Built with Elementor page builder for easy customization
Portfolio custom post type with advanced filtering
Wolf Core plugin with creative-focused widgets and elements
WooCommerce integration for selling creative products
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
Social sharing integration across multiple platforms
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Multiple portfolio layout options (grid, masonry, metro)
Advanced animation effects for portfolio items
Advanced SEO optimization for better visibility
selling_points: The most art-directed portfolio theme in the catalog — ink brushstrokes, shape sliders, cream/off-white palette no competitor offers
Ink brushstroke design elements signal sophistication before a single project loads — the visual identity sells for you
Interactive portfolio thumbnail systems and parallax panels that make work feel alive, not filed
Cream/off-white palette is genuinely rare — designers who reject the dark portfolio aesthetic choose Nu by default
Elementor-powered so the theme bends to your creative workflow, not the other way around
WooCommerce integration lets designers sell services, digital products, or assets without leaving the portfolio
Animated display modes (shape sliders, parallax panels) make even static work feel cinematic
key_benefits: Win high-value clients with a portfolio that itself demonstrates design taste
Attract clients who pay for craft — the editorial aesthetic self-selects them
Showcase multidisciplinary work with shape sliders and parallax panels per project
Sell design services and digital products from the site that builds credibility
Stand apart from Elementor portfolio themes with a look that reads bespoke
Communicate art direction at a glance — no pitch deck required

testimonials.text: Nù is a great looking and flexible WP theme. Also online support works very well.
testimonials.author: jurajgavenda
